heading: Incentives for participation in cost-effective health care plans
label: 1098 Incentives for participation in cost-effective health care plans

children.text: any limitation set out in the second sentence of ; orsection 1079(a) of this title
any requirement for payment by the patient under section 1079(b) or 1086(b) of this title.

children.label: A
children.text: be less costly to the Government than a plan subject to such limitations or payment requirements; or

children.label: B
children.text: provide better services than those provided by a plan subject to such limitations or payment requirements at no additional cost to the Government.

children.label: A
children.text: a plan with respect to which the limitations and payment requirements are waived; and

children.label: B
children.text: a plan with respect to which there is no such waiver.

A waiver under paragraph (1) may not take effect until the end of the 180-day period beginning on the date on which the Secretary submits the report required by paragraph (2) with respect to such waiver.
